analysis: The project appears to be a web application focused on black holes, with existing UI files for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The current theme likely needs enhancement to better reflect the cosmic and black hole topic. The improvements should focus on creating a visually immersive experience with animations, dark cosmic themes, and interactive elements that align with the black hole subject matter.

improvements.description: Update the CSS to include a dark cosmic theme with gradients, animations for black hole visuals, and swirling effects to enhance the immersive experience.
Enhance the HTML to include sections for interactive planets, animated slides, and other black hole-related content to improve user engagement.
Implement JavaScript functionality for smooth animations, interactive elements, and event handlers to ensure all buttons and features work seamlessly.
